Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/npp-humanitarian-extension/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "npp-humanitarian-extension"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. npp-humanitarian-extension

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [[00-question-can-it-apply-to-docs|00-question-can-it-apply-to-docs.md]] — 
* [[01-structural-comparison-code-vs-docs|01-structural-comparison-code-vs-docs.md]] — 
* [[02-mcp-claude-desktop-use-cases|02-mcp-claude-desktop-use-cases.md]] — 
* [[03-what-doesnt-exist-on-market|03-what-doesnt-exist-on-market.md]] — 
* [[04-grant-opportunities|04-grant-opportunities.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[05-which-combination-more-valuable|05-which-combination-more-valuable.md]] —
